name: mi-hyperframes-tutorials
description: A Video-as-Code engine for generating high-end code tutorials using Astro and HyperFrames.

scripts.hf:dev: npm run build && hyperframes preview dist
scripts.hf:check: npm run build && hyperframes lint dist
scripts.hf:render: npm run build && hyperframes render dist
scripts.hf:publish: npm run build && hyperframes publish dist
